one_time_description: Thlap'Qwum Community Settlement Trust receipt of $5,337,982; also $4,359,500 deferred revenue from Province of BC recognized into income in current year
economic_notes: First Nation holds investments in Petroglyph Development Group Limited Partnership (99%), Salpac Fisheries Limited Partnership (49.9%), Tuytaxun General Store Ltd. (100%), Snuneymuxw Sandstone Corporation (dissolved December 2019), and Petroglyph Development Group Ltd. (100%). Snuneymuxw Market Ltd. is a subsidiary of Petroglyph Development Group Ltd. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP investment acquired in current year. $900,301 held by City of Nanaimo in trust for water/sewer connections on IR4.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to verify investment carrying value for Tuytaxun General Store Ltd. (unaudited) and unavailable financial information for Tuytaxun General Store Ltd. and Salpac Fisheries Limited Partnership. Chief and Council chose not to publicly disclose condensed supplementary financial information for GBEs/GBPs citing competitive sensitivity. Prior period adjustments restated 2019 figures: TCA overstated by $480,013 and payroll liabilities understated by $76,589 (total $556,602 reduction to accumulated surplus). $4,359,500 previously deferred Province of BC funds recognized into income in 2020 after being contributed to Petroglyph Development Group LP. Promissory note of $940,327 to Snuneymuxw Market Ltd. was forgiven on April 23, 2020 (subsequent event). No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. OSR calculated as total revenue minus identified government transfers (ISC, CMHC, FNHA, BC Gaming, BC Housing, BC Treaty Commission, CSETS, FNESC, DFO, Province of BC).
